title: elymus corsicus
intro: Elymus corsicus, also known as Corsican wheat grass or Sardinian wheat grass, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients. The health benefits of Elymus corsicus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Elymus corsicus can be consumed as a juice, tea, or supplement, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
